objective: Produce the phase-specific notebook-backed governance evidence required to reopen the incident workflow runtime code write.

current_state.handoff_result: parent returned to R4 after local R2-R4 validation went green

requirements.title: Create the bounded incident workflow blocker package
Make the workflow code-write blocker explicit
Bind the DI governance notebook evidence to this package
Bind the L97 future evidence chain to this package
Reopen the blocked workflow file_edit validation under child-plan authority
Synchronize the parent plan and governance trackers truthfully
Hand the parent initiative back to R2 only if validation reopens green

child_acts.description: Freeze the exact workflow code-write set and MCP denial.
Bind the existing DI and L97 evidence surfaces to this child package.
Reopen blocked validation and hand back to the parent initiative if green.

execution_outcome.result: The blocked incident-workflow file_edit validation reopened green under child-plan authority and the parent initiative returned to local R2-R4 execution.
